title: 收口文档事实与可执行示例

sources.reason: Primary documented workflow and repository facts.
Installation, distribution, architecture, and governance references.

riskAssessment.reason: Stale documentation can cause unsafe installation or governance behavior despite passing code tests.

executionDecision.reason: Documentation checks and release regressions are ready for review-backed verification.

preReviewWarnings: Review repository, release tag, RAW/REF/SHA, downgrade, and calibration claims against executable behavior.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: README and reference docs match repository, release, installation, upgrade, calibration, and supply-chain behavior.
SECURITY/CODEOWNERS and template placeholders are explicit and non-misleading.
Key examples are covered by executable documentation or release tests.
The Work Item is archived and committed.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Documentation is an operational interface; stale release, installation, and governance claims can invalidate otherwise correct implementation evidence.
constraints: Do not claim public capabilities absent from release checks.
intent.rationale: Fact-driven documentation checks reduce drift between the template's operational contract and its prose.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Documentation metadata and required governance facts pass automated checks.
Release and installation examples match executable public behavior.
Governance documentation and placeholders remain system-invariant compliant.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
